    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Altaria
     
    Bibarel
     
    Blizzard
     
    Breloom
     
    Bulbasaur
     
    Challenges
    Challenges is a storage object for the levels system.
    ChallengesHolder
    ChallengesHolder is a storage object for all Challenges, as well as the creator of them.
    CombatController
    The Controller following the MVC architecture that allows the view to cleanly interact with the various game elements.
    CombatController.Difficulty
    Enum that controls which version of the computer AI is used by the CombatController class.
    CombatControllerTests
     
    Covet
     
    DracoMeteor
     
    Earthquake
     
    Facade
     
    Feraligatr
     
    FireFang
     
    Flamethrower
     
    Flygon
     
    Glaciate
     
    HeadSmash
     
    HyperFang
     
    IcePunch
     
    Lapras
     
    Luxray
     
    Mon
    Abstract class that all mons should inherit from.
    Move
    Abstract class that all Mon moves should inherit from.
    Move.Category
    Physical Special Split Moves
    Move.Type
    Enum to support type advantage calculations later in development.
    Player
    A class representing one of the two players in a given fight.
    PlayerID
     
    PlayerTurnController
     
    PoisonJab
     
    PokemonGame
     
    PokemonGameTest
     
    PokemonModel
     
    PokemonView
    PokemonView builds and contains the logic for the UI.
    Raichu
     
    Rampardos
     
    RazorLeaf
     
    Server
    Handles the local networking between game clients.
    SludgeWave
     
    Snorlax
     
    StoneEdge
     
    Swampert
     
    Toxicroak
     
    TypeEffectiveness
    Provides the type effectiveness multipliers between belligerent Pokémon types.
    Typhlosion
     
    Venusaur
     
    VineWhip
     
    Waterfall
     
    Weavile
     
    WildboltStorm
